full_text:
Cheng Bing (Deshu) 程秉 (德樞)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Bing (程秉), styledDeshu (德樞), was born in Runan. Advisor to Sun Quan. Sent as diplomat, with Zhang Fei’s head, to Liu Bei at Yiling. Cheng Bing was affiliated with Shi Xie and the Wu Kingdom. Cheng Bing lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
